title: AlphaFold3 structural models related to cytoplasmic RNA polymerase II complexes
author: Bernecky, Carrie
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
AlphaFold3 models and associated data of structural predictions used for cryo-EM modeling and analysis of cytoplasmic RNA polymerase II complexes: 
 1. Pol II (no clamp)-Gdown1-RPAP2 prediction [used for cryo-EM modeling] 
 2. Pol II (no clamp)-Gdown1 prediction [used for cryo-EM modeling] 
 3. Pol II (no clamp)-TTF2 prediction [used for analysis] 
 4. RPAP2-GPN1-GPN3 prediction [used for cryo-EM modeling and analysis] 
 5. Pol II-GPN1-GPN3 prediction [used for analyis] 
 6. Pol II (no clamp)-GPN1-GPN3 [used for analysis]
steps_raw:
AlphaFold3 models and associated data of structural predictions used for cryo-EM modeling and analysis of cytoplasmic RNA polymerase II complexes: 
 1. Pol II (no clamp)-Gdown1-RPAP2 prediction [used for cryo-EM modeling]

 3. Pol II (no clamp)-TTF2 prediction [used for analysis] 
 4. RPAP2-GPN1-GPN3 prediction [used for cryo-EM modeling and analysis] 
 5. Pol II-GPN1-GPN3 prediction [used for analyis]
